detection_heuristics: CLAUDE.md present at repo root or .claude/ directory
discovery_algorithm: Reads MCP server list from .claude/mcp.json or ~/.claude/mcp.json
rules: file_path must be absolute for FileEdit, FileWrite
notebook_path must be absolute for NotebookEdit
mode must be one of: acceptEdits, auto, bypassPermissions, default, dontAsk, plan
model must be one of: sonnet, opus, haiku

tool_calls.name: Agent
tool_calls.notes: Spawns a sub-agent; supports isolation=worktree; async_launched variant for background agents

tool_calls.name: Bash
tool_calls.notes: Executes shell commands

tool_calls.name: TaskOutput
tool_calls.notes: Records task output; internal tool for agent orchestration

tool_calls.name: ExitPlanMode
tool_calls.notes: Exits plan approval mode

tool_calls.name: FileEdit
tool_calls.notes: Edits a file at absolute path; returns modified/added status

tool_calls.name: FileRead
tool_calls.notes: Reads files; supports text, image, notebook, pdf, parts output types

tool_calls.name: FileWrite
tool_calls.notes: Writes file at absolute path; create or update type

tool_calls.name: Glob
tool_calls.notes: Glob pattern search with optional path and head_limit

tool_calls.name: Grep
tool_calls.notes: ripgrep search with output_mode (content/files_with_matches/count), context flags, head_limit

tool_calls.name: TaskStop
tool_calls.notes: Stops the current task; internal tool

tool_calls.name: ListMcpResources
tool_calls.notes: Lists available MCP server resources

tool_calls.name: Mcp
tool_calls.notes: Invokes an MCP tool; output is string

tool_calls.name: NotebookEdit
tool_calls.notes: Edits Jupyter notebook cells; absolute path required; supports code/markdown cell types and replace/insert/delete edit modes

tool_calls.name: ReadMcpResource
tool_calls.notes: Reads an MCP resource by URI

tool_calls.name: TodoWrite
tool_calls.notes: Writes a todo list; items have status pending/in_progress/completed and optional chip labels (max 12 chars)

tool_calls.name: WebFetch
tool_calls.notes: Fetches a URL; counted in server_tool_use.web_fetch_requests

tool_calls.name: WebSearch
tool_calls.notes: Performs web search; counted in server_tool_use.web_search_requests

tool_calls.name: AskUserQuestion
tool_calls.notes: Asks the user a question; optional source identifier for analytics

tool_calls.name: EnterWorktree
tool_calls.notes: Enters a git worktree isolation context

tool_calls.name: ExitWorktree
tool_calls.notes: Exits a git worktree; action=keep or remove; requires confirmation for uncommitted files

copilot-cli.download_error: Package '@github/copilot-cli' not found in npm registry — skipped this run

adaptor_fixes: crates/libaipm/src/detect.rs (or equivalent): ensure detection checks for .claude/settings.json and CLAUDE.md at repo root and .claude/ directory

crates/libaipm/src/lint.rs (or equivalent): add valid-tool-name rule that cross-references tool_compatibility.engine_exclusive_tools — warn if a plugin declares no 'engines' restriction but uses a Claude-exclusive tool name
crates/libaipm/src/install.rs: when installing claude-code plugins, scan .claude/commands/ and .claude/agents/ for manifests
crates/libaipm/src/migrate.rs: handle 'isolation: worktree' field in agent frontmatter
MCP config discovery: scan .claude/mcp.json in addition to project root mcp.json
test_cases: Detection: repo with only CLAUDE.md at root should be detected as claude engine
Detection: repo with .claude/settings.json should be detected as claude engine
Lint/valid-tool-name: plugin targeting 'all' engines using 'NotebookEdit' should produce a warning
Lint/valid-tool-name: plugin with engines=[claude] using 'NotebookEdit' should pass
Install: .claude/commands/*.md files are discovered and registered as slash commands
Install: .claude/agents/*.md files are discovered and registered as sub-agents
Migration: agent frontmatter with isolation=worktree roundtrips correctly
MCP: ListMcpResources, Mcp, ReadMcpResource tool names are accepted for claude engine
Size: head_limit=0 means unlimited; head_limit absent means default 250
Mode: valid values are acceptEdits, auto, bypassPermissions, default, dontAsk, plan
behaviour_variants: Agent tool can return two variants: 'completed' (sync) and 'async_launched' (background) — handle both in output parsing
FileRead returns 5 output variants: text, image, notebook, pdf, parts — handle each
FileEdit and FileWrite require absolute paths — lint or normalize relative paths
TodoWrite chip labels must be ≤ 12 characters — add validation
ExitWorktree with action=remove and uncommitted files requires explicit confirmation field
service_tier can be standard, priority, or batch — may affect rate limits in aipm tooling
cache_creation has ephemeral_1h and ephemeral_5m token counts — potentially useful for cost tracking

adaptor_fixes: Package '@github/copilot-cli' is not published to npm. Check if the package has been renamed or moved to a different registry. Possible alternatives: '@githubnext/github-copilot-cli', 'github-copilot-cli'.
test_cases: Verify correct npm package name for GitHub Copilot CLI before next analysis run
behaviour_variants: Package unavailable on npm — all tool_calls and API surface for copilot-cli are unknown until package is found
